betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Thermonuclear Bomb§f:
The Thermonuclear Core (trinity:thermonuclear_core_pu239) is the central component of a hydrogen bomb. It uses a Plutonium-239 primary to ignite a Lithium-6 Deuteride secondary, producing fusion reactions that release vastly more energy than a pure fission device.

§6Thermonuclear Core Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:95)§f:
The core is built when TrinityConfig.thermonuclear is true:
- Pattern "LLL / PPP / LLL"
- L = ingotLithium6Deuteride (Li-6 D, the fusion fuel)
- P = ingotPlutonium239 (the fission primary)
- Yields 1 thermonuclear_core_pu239

§6How a Thermonuclear Bomb Works§f:
A hydrogen bomb works in two stages:

§6Primary Stage (Fission)§f:
- The Plutonium-239 core is compressed by surrounding explosives (similar to a fission bomb)
- Fission chain reaction begins, releasing ~10-50 kt of energy
- The energy is channeled into the secondary

§6Secondary Stage (Fusion)§f:
- The intense X-ray radiation from the primary compresses the Li-6 D secondary
- Li-6 + neutron → He-4 + H-3 (tritium) + 4.8 MeV
- Tritium + Deuterium → He-4 + neutron + 17.6 MeV (D-T fusion)
- The fast neutrons from D-T fusion cause Li-7 + n → He-4 + T + n (more tritium breeding)
- The fusion reaction releases ~1000× the energy of the primary

§6Lithium-6 Deuteride (TrinityRecipes.java:51)§f:
The fusion fuel is ingotLithium6Deuteride, made via the Infuser:
- Input: ingotLithium6 + fluidStack("deuterium")
- Output: ingotLithium6Deuteride
- Speed 1.0, Power 1.0

To make ingotLithium6:
- Isotope Separator: 10× ingotLithium/dustLithium → 9× Lithium-7 + 1× Lithium-6

To make deuterium:
- Isotope Separator (Uranium → Depleted U-238 + UF6 byproduct)
- Or Electrolyzer: heavy_water → deuterium + oxygen

§6Direct Descendants of Thermonuclear Core (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 3 items used in the core recipe:
- ingotLithium6Deuteride (the fusion fuel)
- ingotPlutonium239 (NC) (the fission primary)
- ingotPlutonium239 (HBM) (alternative Pu-239 source)

§6Why It Matters§f:
The thermonuclear bomb is the most powerful conventional weapon in the modpack. Its yield is configured by TrinityConfig (typically 50-100× the yield of a single fission bomb). The fallout radius is also significantly larger.

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30055 (First Nuclear Bomb) — you need the basic fission bomb assembly chain to access the thermonuclear core.

§eTip§f: To mass-produce Lithium-6 Deuteride, set up an Infuser line with ingotLithium6 + deuterium. Combine with a Separator processing line for Lithium-6 enrichment.

§eTip§f: Always have at least 10 ingotPlutonium239 stockpiled before attempting to craft a thermonuclear core. Pu-239 is harder to produce than U-233.

§cWarning§f: A single thermonuclear detonation can flatten an area the size of a small village. Detonate only in designated test zones far from civilization.
